{{Infobox artifact
| name = Zenith Cannon
| introduced = The Knight
}}

''See also: [[Zenith Cannon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] Cannon is a sentient [[Zenith Device]], a category of highly advanced ancient human creations. In its current state, it takes the form of a standard plasma pistol, though it possesses a visual appearance reminiscent of a small, multicolored sun with solar-flare-like arms. The weapon is capable of speech and exhibits a distinct personality, characterized by cackling and a sense of judgment regarding the worthiness of its wielders. It has previously rejected members of [[Horizon]]'s crew, eventually choosing a member of [[the Perfected]] as its user. The Cannon is considered an extremely potent asset; if awakened, it can be used to achieve significant strategic goals and prevent enemies from securing its power. Its destructive potential is immense, described as having the strength of an entire fleet combined into a single artillery platform.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith]] Cannon is one of the seven legendary [[Zenith Devices]] and a highly sought-after weapon that was previously tracked passing through [[Mell]]'s location. Although it manifests as a standard white metal plasma pistol resembling a [[Lightcaster IV]], the object contains an interior of folded space large enough to hold a dreadnought without adding mass. This sentient weapon, which is capable of speaking and conducting quizzes, was donated by the narrator's father and later acquired by [[Benri Vallenar]] as a sacrificial play. While [[Varic]] requires the device and [[Mell]] suggests its retrieval, the cannon has been subject to various hands, including being cradled by [[Omega]] and eventually held by [[Sola]]. Ultimately, [[the Perfected]] managed to acquire the [[Zenith]] Cannon.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A device matching the [[Zenith Cannon]] passed through [[Mell]]'s location last year.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is a device the crew is searching for.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is one of the seven [[Zenith Devices]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is an object the narrator's magic is better used hunting.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is a sought-after object.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is a weapon that [[Mell]] suggests retrieving.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri Vallenar]] acquired the [[Zenith Cannon]] as a sacrificial play.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is a weapon that [[Varic]] needs.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is a genuine [[Zenith Device]] that manifests as a standard plasma pistol.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]]'s appearance is similar to a [[Lightcaster IV]] plasma pistol.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] has an external shell of white metal.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]]'s interior is folded space, similar to [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]]'s interior dimensions are large enough to contain a dreadnought without increasing its mass.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is a sentient weapon that can speak and conduct quizzes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator's father donated the [[Zenith Cannon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is cradled by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Omega]] has been whispering to the [[Zenith Cannon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sola]] has the [[Zenith Cannon]] away from [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] had acquired the [[Zenith Cannon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Cannon]] resembles a small multicolored sun with arms like solar flares.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Cannon]] is a weapon that [[Mell]] studied to develop drone firepower.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Mell chewed on what I assumed was a piece of gum. “If it were me, I’d want the Zenith Cannon first.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“I am the Zenith Cannon! Now, a quick quiz before I see if you’re worthy of wielding me. How many ships would you say you’ve blown up?”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
